bestFor: design studios pretending to be engineers
editorial about-pages that need to feel earned
constraints: One accent only — oxblood — for registration crosses, status dot, detail ring, and rubber stamp
Display headline must be monospace, not serif/sans display
Vellum cream base — never pure white, never blueprint blue
Borders ≥1.5 px solid ink; hairlines no fainter than 28% opacity

description.en: A design-studio manifesto rendered as a draughtsman's technical sheet.
description.ja: 製図者の図面シートとしてレンダリングされたデザイン・スタジオ宣言。
description.ko: 제도사의 도면 시트처럼 그려낸 디자인 스튜디오 선언문.

styles.layout: Sheet frame with registration crosshairs and coordinate ruler. Strip header, cover block, dimension-line section separators, general notes table, bill-of-materials grid, detail callout with magnification ring, conventional title block, footer notes
styles.motion: No layout motion — only 200 ms colour transitions on hover; rubber stamp rotates -8°

summary.en: The studio page IS a drafting sheet: registration crosshairs, coordinate ruler, bill of materials, detail callout, and a real title block in the bottom-right corner.
summary.ja: スタジオ・ページそのものが*図面シート*である: 見当十字、座標ルーラー、部品表、詳細コールアウト、そして製図規約に従う右下の表題欄。
summary.ko: 스튜디오 페이지 자체가 *도면 시트*입니다. 견당 십자선, 좌표 눈금자, 부품표, 상세 콜아웃, 그리고 도면 규약을 따른 오른쪽 아래 표제란까지.

styles.typography: JetBrains Mono throughout — display title included, no serif anywhere; uniform draftsman stroke and tabular numerics

visualProfile.headline: monospace display at engineering scale, all caps
visualProfile.surface: warm vellum sheet with crosshairs and coordinate grid

constraints: No accent chroma — only #FAFAFA emphasis on #08090A base
No gradient fills, no glow shadows, no rainbow
Borders must be visible on dark: #1F1F23 (≈12% white) for hairlines, #2A2A2F (≈17%) for divisions, #3A3A3F (≈22%) for input/button outlines

description.en: A Linear-tier SaaS marketing landing in true black, with zero chroma — hierarchy comes from typography alone.
description.ja: 純黒と無彩色だけで構成したLinear級のSaaSマーケティング・ランディング。階層はタイポグラフィのみで表現。
description.ko: 진짜 검정과 무채색만으로 만든 Linear급 SaaS 마케팅 랜딩. 위계는 오직 타이포그래피로 잡습니다.

styles.layout: Standard SaaS-landing sectioning with strict left-aligned content max-width 1180; vertical rhythm on 8px baseline; section vertical gap 120px
styles.motion: Restrained: 200ms colour/border on hover, viewport-entry fade-up stagger 60ms per item, no scroll-bound parallax

summary.en: Practical reusable reference for product SaaS: top nav, hero, customer-logo strip, three feature blocks, three-step workflow, four metric cards, three-tier pricing, testimonial, final CTA strip, four-column footer.
summary.ja: 製品SaaS実務リファレンス: ナビ / ヒーロー / 顧客ロゴ / 3機能ブロック / 3ステップ / 4指標カード / 3層プライシング / 引用 / 最終CTA / 4列フッター。
summary.ko: 제품형 SaaS 실무 레퍼런스: 톱 내비 / 히어로 / 고객사 로고 / 3 피처 블록 / 3-스텝 워크플로 / 4 지표 카드 / 3-티어 프라이싱 / 인용 / 마지막 CTA / 4-컬럼 푸터.

styles.typography: Inter Tight 600/700 for display, Inter 400/500 for body, JetBrains Mono for numbers/eyebrows/badges

visualProfile.headline: tight-tracked display sans with mono numerics

bestFor: studio launch pages whose first page should read as a careful object rather than a homepage
quiet products that arrive in a small box — stationery, perfume, ceramics, slow wellness
premium single-product launches with paper-packaging feel — hardware, watches, audio
minimal portfolio sites where curated photography carries the page
constraints: NO warm tint, NO yellow palette, NO grey decision-avoidance — pure white only
NO drawn SVG figures (bellows / lungs / cranes) — use REAL UNSPLASH photographs
NO origami fold polygons, NO sphere as primary visual
NO classical serif display, NO Archivo Black at hero
Sky blue appears at four signal moments: title period, manifesto bracket, live breath numeric, NEVER-FOR row label
Credit photographers in the colophon (Unsplash license)

description.en: A quiet white page. Soft photographs of inflated forms — balloons, fabric, sky — sit on surfaces that gently rise and sink. Sky blue appears only four times.
description.ja: 静かな白いページ。膨らんだ事物の柔らかな写真 — 風船、布、空 — が、浮かんで沈む面の上に置かれる。空色は四度だけ姿を見せる。
description.ko: 조용한 흰 페이지. 부드럽게 부푼 사물들의 사진 — 풍선, 천, 하늘 — 이 떠오르거나 가라앉는 표면 위에 놓입니다. 하늘색은 단 네 번만 등장합니다.

styles.layout: Six editorial sections inside a 1280px shell. HERO (centered: mono brand strip + Plus Jakarta title with sky-5 period + Inter italic sub + 16:9 Plate I balloon image, max 1080px + hairline meta band). MANIFESTO (2-col: portrait fabric plate left, eyebrow with sky-5 [ ] brackets + headline + 2 body paragraphs right). VARIATIONS (3-col head + 3 square Plates II/III/IV). BREATH BAR (single row card with title + 3 readouts including sky-5 live numeric). USES (2-col: title + 4-row when/what list, NEVER-FOR row sky-5). COLOPHON (2-col card with display headline + body + spec list + photographer credits row).
styles.motion: Two quiet signals. (1) @property --si-breath-ambient <number> + @keyframes 0.35 ↔ 0.92 over 8s, drives each frame's box-shadow throw 18-34px + breath-bar live numeric. (2) pointermove writes --si-cursor-x / --si-cursor-y to root (EMA 0.08), feeds each image's saturate / brightness filter. Frame hover translateY(-4px) with image scale 1.04 over 600ms.

summary.en: A near-white reading surface where the depth language is the page's point. Six clean editorial sections, each surface either RAISED (principle cards, colophon, image plates) or RECESSED (hero meta band, breath well) via dual-shadow neumorphism on a shared material. HERO (mono brand + Plus Jakarta 800 "Soft Inflate" with sky-5 period + Plate I balloon image), MANIFESTO (2-col: fabric plate + manifesto text with sky-5 [ ] brackets), PRINCIPLES (3 raised cards on the room's rules), VARIATIONS (3 plates II/III/IV), BREATH WELL (carved single-row readout with live sky-5 numeric), USES (4-row list, NEVER-FOR in sky-5), COLOPHON. Frames + cards breathe via box-shadow amplitude on an 8-second cycle; cursor movement shifts each image's saturate/brightness slightly.
summary.ja: 深さの言語が*ページの本質*であるほぼ純白の読み面。清潔な六つのエディトリアル・セクション、各面は*浮き彫り (raised)* — principle カード、colophon、image plates — または*彫り込み (recessed)* — hero meta band、breath well — 共有された素材の上の dual-shadow ニューモーフィズムで表現します。HERO (モノのブランド + Plus Jakarta 800 "Soft Inflate" + sky-5 の句点 + Plate I の風船画像)、MANIFESTO (二段: 布プレート + sky-5 [ ] 括弧のマニフェスト)、PRINCIPLES (部屋のルールについての浮き彫りカード三つ)、VARIATIONS (三プレート II/III/IV)、BREATH WELL (彫り込まれた単一行リードアウト、sky-5 live 数値)、USES (四行リスト、NEVER-FOR sky-5)、COLOPHON。フレーム + カードが八秒周期の box-shadow 振幅で呼吸、カーソル移動が各画像の saturate/brightness を微調整。
summary.ko: 깊이의 언어 자체가 *페이지의 핵심*인 거의 순백에 가까운 독서 면. 깔끔한 6개 에디토리얼 섹션으로, 각 면은 공유된 재질 위에 이중 그림자 뉴모피즘으로 *양각(raised)* — principle 카드, colophon, image plates — 이거나 *음각(recessed)* — hero meta band, breath well — 입니다. HERO(모노 브랜드 + Plus Jakarta 800 "Soft Inflate" + sky-5 마침표 + Plate I 풍선 이미지), MANIFESTO(2단: 천 plate + sky-5 [ ] 괄호의 매니페스토), PRINCIPLES(이 공간의 규칙을 담은 양각 카드 3장), VARIATIONS(plate II/III/IV 3장), BREATH WELL(파낸 듯한 단일 행 readout, sky-5 실시간 수치), USES(4행 리스트, NEVER-FOR는 sky-5), COLOPHON. 프레임과 카드가 8초 주기로 box-shadow 진폭을 따라 호흡하고, 커서 움직임에 따라 각 이미지의 saturate·brightness가 미세하게 바뀝니다.

styles.typography: Plus Jakarta Sans 800 for hero title (clamp 3.6-12rem) and section headlines — clean modern geometric. Inter 400/500 for body (line-height 1.7). IBM Plex Mono for labels / meta / readouts. No classical serif, no Archivo Black at display.

visualProfile.headline: Plus Jakarta Sans display with sky-blue accent moments
visualProfile.rhythm: 8-second breathing frames + cursor-driven micro saturation, nothing else moves
visualProfile.surface: pure white reading surface with four softly-lit Unsplash photographs

constraints: Keep the background warm and quiet
Use pixel type as the counterpoint, not as the whole page
Tickets need black hard shadows, perforation dots, tape, and real service labels
Do not imitate a specific logo or copy from a reference site

description.en: A studio landing system where clean agency typography is interrupted by pixel utility type and a crooked service ticket board.
description.ja: クリーンなエージェンシー書体を、ピクセルのユーティリティ文字と歪んだサービスチケットボードが断ち切るスタジオ向けランディング。
description.ko: 깔끔한 스튜디오 타이포 위에 픽셀 라벨과 비뚤어진 서비스 티켓 보드를 얹은 스튜디오용 랜딩 스타일.

styles.layout: Warm asymmetric first viewport, oversized headline, crooked service ticket board with tape/perforation details, then a split process sheet with a sticky pixel index
styles.motion: Service tickets lift by hard shadow only, active ticket strip updates on hover/focus, process marker follows scroll with IntersectionObserver

summary.en: Inspired by agency-first references with huge type and service tiles, then rebuilt as a ticket-board workbench so it reads as Web Stylebook rather than a copy.
summary.ja: 大きな書体とサービスタイルを持つエージェンシー参照に着想を得つつ、そのまま写さずチケットボードのワークベンチとして再構成し、模倣ではなくWeb Stylebookとして読める融合です。
summary.ko: 큰 헤드라인과 서비스 카드가 있는 에이전시 레퍼런스를 그대로 베끼지 않고, 작업 보드에 붙은 티켓처럼 재구성한 Web Stylebook식 퓨전입니다.

styles.typography: Rounded agency sans for the main headline, pixel display for the ticket numbers and section counters, mono/tabular labels for brief metadata

visualProfile.headline: rounded agency headline with pixel ticket labels
visualProfile.rhythm: process rhythm driven by numbered pixel markers
visualProfile.surface: warm canvas with taped service tickets and receipt strip
